name: GAIL India
oneLine: CSP unsafe-inline + unsafe-eval (XSS surface); otherwise strong
findings: CSP includes unsafe-inline AND unsafe-eval in script-src — significant XSS surface
Otherwise solid: HSTS, p=reject DMARC, tight SPF
Apache backend, 2 subdomains only — minimal CT footprint

attackPaths.name: CSP bypass → stored XSS → admin token theft
attackPaths.entry: Inject <script> via form field; unsafe-inline + unsafe-eval allow execution.
attackPaths.pivot: Token harvesting from localStorage / session storage; admin impersonation.
attackPaths.objective: Site malware injection; admin account loss; sensitive data exfil.

attackPaths.name: Spear-phishing with sector-themed lure
attackPaths.entry: Craft spoofed energy-sector policy memo (GAIL/NRL/MRPL letterhead).
attackPaths.pivot: Email executive with .lnk → attacker-hosted .exe (SideCopy TTP). RAT deployment.
attackPaths.objective: Supply-chain compromise via trusted internal communications.

attackPaths.name: Refinery-contractor email phishing
attackPaths.entry: Phish refinery contractor mailboxes with sector-themed lure.

paths.preAi: CSP misconfiguration → stored XSS → admin access loss + sensitive data exfil
paths.mythos: AI-augmented attacker chains XSS payload mutation with token-harvesting playbook
Lure document generation accelerated; supply-chain compromise compressed

cisoPatchList.title: Tighten CSP — remove unsafe-inline and unsafe-eval from script-src
cisoPatchList.fix: Use nonce-based CSP for inline scripts. Audit templates for inline event handlers; migrate to external files.

cisoPatchList.title: Audit form fields and AJAX endpoints for injection points; deploy WAF rule
cisoPatchList.fix: Pen-test form inputs. Cloudflare/ModSecurity rule: block <script>, <iframe>, on*= patterns.

cisoPatchList.title: Subresource Integrity (SRI) on all CDN-hosted scripts
cisoPatchList.fix: Add integrity=sha384-... attributes on external <script src> tags.
cisoPatchList.validation: All external scripts have SRI hash attributes

cisoPatchList.title: SIEM / EDR monitoring for suspicious document opens
cisoPatchList.fix: Monitor Office macro execution and .lnk launches. Pilot 50-100 endpoints.
cisoPatchList.validation: EDR logs show exec block on suspicious file types

cisoPatchList.title: Email attachment filtering — block .lnk, .exe, .ps1, macro Office
cisoPatchList.fix: Mail gateway: block these extensions. Warn on external sender. Quarantine if exec content.

cisoPatchList.title: Service-account credential rotation; reduce session TTL
cisoPatchList.fix: Rotate all web-app service account creds. Audit token expiry; reduce to <4 h for sensitive ops.
cisoPatchList.validation: Application logs show session TTL < 4 h for sensitive ops

phase2.headlineQuestion: Can GAIL eliminate unsafe-inline/unsafe-eval from CSP before the next XSS injection is discovered in a public form field?
